ValidationRule.description: Perten Sales reps will not be able to set their Opportunities to Closed Won Stage, only designated team will.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND($Setup.Rules_Execution__c.Run__c, AND( ISCHANGED(StageName), AND(ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Won"), OR($UserRole.Name = "Perten US Account Manager", $UserRole.Name = "Perten US Regional Manager",$UserRole.Name = "Perten CA Account Manager"))))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_020: You are not authorized to set this Opportunity to Closed Won Stage. Please refer to your manager or finance/order team for help.
